creator: void@f-m.fm
text:
Hello,

this is on an ipv6-only poudriere instance on amd64, in case this makes a difference.

electron22 fails here:

00:00:20] ===>  License BSD3CLAUSE LGPL21 MPL11 MIT accepted by the user
[00:00:20] ===>   electron22-22.3.1 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
[00:00:20] ===>   electron22-22.3.1 depends on package: yarn-node16>0 - found
[00:00:20] if [ ! -f /portdistfiles/electron/electron-yarn-cache-22.3.1.tar.xz ];  then /bin/mkdir -p /wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/electron22/work;  echo 'yarn-offline-mirror "./yarn-offline-cache"' >>  /wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/electron22/work/.yarnrc;  cp -f /usr/ports/devel/electron22/files/package.json /usr/ports/devel/electron22/files/yarn.lock /wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/electron22/work;  cd /wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/electron22/work && /usr/bin/env HOME=/wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/electron22/work XDG_CACHE_HOME=/wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/electron22/work/.cache  yarn --frozen-lockfile --ignore-scripts;  /usr/sbin/mtree -cbnSp yarn-offline-cache | /usr/sbin/mtree -C | /usr/bin/sed  -e 's:time=[0-9.]*:time=1677373220.000000000:'  -e 's:\([gu]id\)=[0-9]*:\1=0:g'  -e 's:flags=.*:flags=none:'  -e 's:^\.:./yarn-offline-cache:' > yarn-offline-cache.mtree;  /usr/bin/tar cJf /portdistfiles/electron/electron-yarn-cache-22.3.1.tar.xz  @yarn-offline-cache.mtree;  /bin/rm -f -r /wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/electron22/work;  fi

[00:00:21] [2/4] Fetching packages...
